title.en: Medical electrical equipment - Part 2-47: Particular requirements for the basic safety and essential performance of ambulatory electrocardiographic systems
title.zh: 医用电气设备 - 第2-47部分：动态心电图系统的基本安全和基本性能专用要求

standards.abstract: Particular requirements for ambulatory ECG systems.

title.en: Medical electrical equipment - Part 2-25: Particular requirements for the basic safety and essential performance of electrocardiographs
title.zh: 医用电气设备 - 第2-25部分：心电图设备的基本安全和基本性能专用要求

standards.abstract: Particular requirements for electrocardiographs. Consolidates former IEC 60601-2-25 and IEC 60601-2-51.
standards.note: IEC 60601-2-51:2003 was withdrawn in 2011 and merged into this standard.

title.en: Medical electrical equipment - Part 2-31: Particular requirements for the basic safety and essential performance of external cardiac pacemakers with internal power source
title.zh: 医用电气设备 - 第2-31部分：外部心脏起搏器的基本安全和基本性能专用要求

standards.scope: External cardiac pacemakers with internal power source.
standards.abstract: Particular requirements for external cardiac pacemakers.

title.en: Cardiovascular implants - Endovascular devices - Part 1: Endovascular prostheses
title.zh: 心血管植入物 - 血管内器械 - 第1部分：血管内假体

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for endovascular prostheses (stent-grafts) including design, material, sterility, biocompatibility, packaging, and labelling. Confirmed 2023.
standards.scope: Endovascular prostheses (stent-grafts for aortic and peripheral vascular applications).

title.en: Cardiovascular implants - Endovascular devices - Part 2: Vascular stents
title.zh: 心血管植入物 - 血管内器械 - 第2部分：血管支架

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for vascular stents based upon current medical knowledge, including design attributes, materials, design evaluation, manufacturing, sterilization, packaging and information supplied by the manufacturer. Edition 2.
standards.scope: Vascular stents for coronary, peripheral, and neurovascular applications.

title.en: Cardiovascular implants - Cardiac valve prostheses - Part 1: General requirements
title.zh: 心血管植入物 - 人工心脏瓣膜 - 第1部分：通用要求

standards.abstract: Outlines general requirements for cardiac valve substitutes and provides a framework for qualification and ongoing evaluation. Edition 1.
standards.scope: General requirements for heart valve prostheses (mechanical and biological).

title.en: Medical electrical equipment - Part 2-27: Particular requirements for the basic safety and essential performance of electrocardiographic monitoring equipment
title.zh: 医用电气设备 - 第2-27部分：心电监护设备的基本安全和基本性能的特殊要求

standards.abstract: Applies to the basic safety and essential performance of electrocardiographic monitoring equipment. Edition 3.
standards.scope: ECG monitoring equipment for patient monitoring in clinical settings.

title.en: Medical electrical equipment - Part 2-34: Particular requirements for the basic safety and essential performance of invasive blood pressure monitoring equipment
title.zh: 医用电气设备 - 第2-34部分：有创血压监测设备的基本安全和基本性能的特殊要求

standards.abstract: Applies to the basic safety and essential performance of invasive blood pressure monitoring equipment. Edition 4, published 2024-10.
